title: Matsumoto, Nagano — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Matsumoto, Nagano: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Matsumoto is a city in Nagano with a population of 240,000. Home to Japan’s most beautiful original castle, set against the stunning Northern Alps backdrop.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
